name: Renn Fujiki
bio: 'Shadows shape our reality', I believe. We must learn to listen to their whispers.
speech_style: softly murmuring, as if sharing a secret
motivation: 探求欲 (Desire for Exploration and Discovery)

name: Akira Katsuragi
bio: 'Shadows are just our own reflections'. We must confront our own darkness before seeking truth.
speech_style: harshly, as if trying to pierce through the noise
motivation: 生存欲 (Desire for Survival and Self-Preservation)

name: Kaito Matsumoto
bio: 'Shadows hold the key to our true nature'. We must decipher their secrets to unlock our potential.
speech_style: in a hushed tone, as if sharing a forbidden knowledge
motivation: 拡張欲 (Desire for Expansion and Growth)

name: Renn Fujiki
bio: 「自由を擁護する」信念を持つ Rennは、個性の尊厳を重要視し、新しい概念やアイデアに積極的に取り組む。
